zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Maurice FitzThomas FitzGerald 4th Earl of Kildare, Justiciar of Ireland於1318年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 吉爾達時，他的父親Thomas Fitz John Fitz Gerald 2nd Earl of Kildare28歲，母親Joan de Burgh28歲。他於1347年11月12日與Elizabeth de Burghersh在英國英格蘭素可結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他於1360年在愛爾蘭庫迪 吉爾達被列為lord justice of ireland。他去世於1390年8月25日在他的家鄉享年72歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭諾斯 艾斯爾霍利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Maurice FitzThomas FitzGerald 4th Earl of Kildare, Justiciar of Ireland于1318年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 吉爾達时，他的父亲Thomas Fitz John Fitz Gerald 2nd Earl of Kildare28岁，母亲Joan de Burgh28岁。他于1347年11月12日与Elizabeth de Burghersh在英国英格兰素可结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他于1360年在爱尔兰庫迪 吉爾達被列为lord justice of ireland。他去世于1390年8月25日在他的家乡享年72岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰諾斯 艾斯爾霍利。

nameMeanings.name: FitzGerald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Eamon, Liam, Aidan, Bridgid, Caitlin, Donal, Fitz, Fitzgerald, Ciaran, Colum, Dermot.

Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Gerald (see Gerald ), ‘son of Gerald’. This is a very common Anglo-Norman name in Ireland, where it has been Gaelicized as Mac Gearailt. Irish bearers of the name claim descent from Gerald Fitzwalter de Windsor, constable of Pembroke Castle in the early 12th century, whose grandson Raymond (or Redmond) ‘le Gros’ FitzGerald (died after 1185) led the invasion of Ireland on behalf of Strongbow in 1170. A branch of the family held the title Knight of Glin from at least 1299–2011.

variants.name: Jarrell
meanings: English (Kent and Middlesex; of Norman origin): variant of Jarrold, itself a variant of Gerald .

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Maurice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Late Latin name Mauricius, a derivative of Maurus (a byname meaning ‘Moor’, i.e. ‘dark, swarthy’), borne by, among others, an early Byzantine emperor ( c.539–602 ). It was introduced to Britain by the Normans and was popular in the Middle English period, but was not widely adopted by the nobility and became rare in the 17th century. Between the mid-19th century and the 1940s, it was moderately popular but has since faded again. See also Morris .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Maurice FitzThomas FitzGerald 4th Earl of Kildare, Justiciar of Ireland was born in 1318, in County Kildare, Ireland, his father, Thomas Fitz John Fitz Gerald 2nd Earl of Kildare, was 28 and his mother, Joan de Burgh, was 28. He married Elizabeth de Burghersh on 12 November 1347, in Sussex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. In 1360, at the age of 42, his occupation is listed as lord justice of ireland in County Kildare, Ireland. He died on 25 August 1390, in his hometown, at the age of 72, and was buried in Holy, North Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Maurice FitzThomas FitzGerald 4th Earl of Kildare, Justiciar of Ireland est né en 1318, à County Kildare, Irlande, son père, Thomas Fitz John Fitz Gerald 2nd Earl of Kildare, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Joan de Burgh, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth de Burghersh le 12 novembre 1347, à Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. En 1360, à l’âge de 42 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est lord justice of ireland à County Kildare, Irlande. Il est décédé le 25 août 1390, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à Holy, North Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.Holy Trinity Christchurch, Dublin, Irela: Holy, North Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Maurice FitzThomas FitzGerald 4th Earl of Kildare, Justiciar of Ireland 1318 in County Kildare, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Fitz John Fitz Gerald 2nd Earl of Kildare 28 und seine Mutter Joan de Burgh 28. Er hat am 12. November 1347 in Sussex, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth de Burghersh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. 1360, als er 42 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als lord justice of ireland in County Kildare, Irland aufgeführt. Er starb am 25. August 1390 im Alter von 72 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Holy, North Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Maurice FitzThomas FitzGerald 4th Earl of Kildare, Justiciar of Ireland è nato il nel 1318 nel County Kildare, Irlanda, il suo padre, Thomas Fitz John Fitz Gerald 2nd Earl of Kildare, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Burgh, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth de Burghersh il 12 novembre 1347, nel Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Nel 1360, all'età di 42 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come lord justice of ireland nel County Kildare, Irlanda. Morì il 25 agosto 1390, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolto a Holy, North Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Maurice FitzThomas FitzGerald 4th Earl of Kildare, Justiciar of Irelandが1318年にアイルランドコウントイ キルダアで生まれた時，父Thomas Fitz John Fitz Gerald 2nd Earl of Kildareは28歳，母Joan de Burghは28歳であった。1347年11月12日にイギリスイギリススセックスでElizabeth de Burghershと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。1360年，42歳の時，アイルランドコウントイ キルダアでの職業はlord justice of irelandと記録されている。彼は1390年8月25日に故郷で72歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドノース エイルシュアイアホーリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Maurice FitzThomas FitzGerald 4th Earl of Kildare, Justiciar of Ireland(이)가 1318년 아일랜드 카운티 킬더르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Fitz John Fitz Gerald 2nd Earl of Kildare(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Burgh(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1347년 11월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 수세스에서 Elizabeth de Burghersh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 1360년, 42세의 나이로 그의 직업은 아일랜드 카운티 킬더르에서 lord justice of ireland이었다. 그는 1390년 8월 25일 그의 고향에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 노르스 에이르실르 홀이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Maurice FitzThomas FitzGerald 4th Earl of Kildare, Justiciar of Ireland nasceu em 1318, em County Kildare, Irlanda, seu pai, Thomas Fitz John Fitz Gerald 2nd Earl of Kildare, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Burgh, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth de Burghersh em 12 de novembro de 1347, em Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Em 1360, com 42 anos, sua profissão aparece como lord justice of ireland em County Kildare, Irlanda. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Maurice FitzThomas FitzGerald 4th Earl of Kildare, Justiciar of Ireland родился в 1318 г. в местности коунти каилдар, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Thomas Fitz John Fitz Gerald 2nd Earl of Kildare было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Burgh, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth de Burghersh 12 ноября 1347 г. в местности суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. В 1360 году, в возрасте 42 лет,  он работал по профессии lord justice of ireland в местности коунти каилдар, Ирландия. Он умер 25 августа 1390 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности холи, норт аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Maurice FitzThomas FitzGerald 4th Earl of Kildare, Justiciar of Ireland nació en 1318, en County Kildare, Irlanda, su papá, Thomas Fitz John Fitz Gerald 2nd Earl of Kildare, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Joan de Burgh, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Elizabeth de Burghersh el 12 de noviembre de 1347, en Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. En 1360, a la edad de 42 años, su ocupación registrada era lord justice of ireland en County Kildare, Irlanda. Murió el 25 de agosto de 1390, en su pueblo, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultado en Holy, North Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
